_reviewOnly: This manifest is a review/evidence artifact only. It is NOT the production manifest for tile_farm_grass_base (grass_b and grass_c do not exist yet) and its output is NOT a runtime asset. Do not load target.outputPath in Phaser or reference it from a production manifest.
_sourceNote: Pipeline limitation fixed generically in scripts/normalize-asset-sheet.mjs: RGB sources are now accepted under background.mode 'alpha' (readPng already synthesizes alpha=255 for RGB input), and fit:'fill' is now implemented (independent X/Y nearest-neighbour scaling to fully cover the destination cell). This manifest now points directly at the approved source at assets/source/generated/tile_farm_grass_base/grass_a.png; the temporary RGBA-adapter copy has been removed.
